name: Chilled Mocha Eggnog
directions: In a bowl, dissolve coffee in water.
Add eggnog, brown sugar and cinnamon;.
whisk until sugar is dissolved.
Chill.
In a mixing bowl, beat cream,.
confectioners' sugar and vanilla until soft peaks form.
Pour eggnog mixture into glasses; top with whipped cream.
Notes: This recipe was tested with commercially prepared eggnog.

name: Learn Your Abc's
directions: Layer your A, B and C in a shot glass.
Take it slow be sure not to mix.
Now its time to learn your ABCs, skull.

name: Rick Flair
directions: Chill your shot glass first.
Mix all the ingredients in the shot glass.
Serve and skull.

name: A Duck Fart
directions: Place the ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Shake and then strain into 3 shot glasses.
Down the hatch!

name: Snow Cap Shooter
directions: Layer tequila first and then the Bailey's in a shot glass.
Enjoy the drink.

name: Decadence
directions: Pour Kahlua first, then Baileys, then Frangelico into a shot glass.
Shoot.

name: Three Wise Men
directions: Place all ingredients into a shaker cup with ice.
Shake, shake, shake.
Shake, shake,shake.
Strain and serve in 3 shot glasses.
You know what next, singing down, down, down, down, down, down.

name: Undertow
directions: Layer the raspberry schnapps first and then the blue curacao.
1,2,3 down.

name: Gin my Citrus
directions: Add the Gin and contreau to a shaker glass filled with ice.
Add squeezed lemon juice to the shaker.
Shake hard and stain and poor into 2 shot glasses.
Shoot!

name: Santa Shot
directions: Layer these in a shot glass in order red, green and white for that real Christmas look.
Best drunk in a group.
1,2,3, down the hatch.

name: Christmas Cheer
directions: Pour ingredients into a highball glass and stir.
Sit back, relax and enjoy.

name: Cane My Christmas Drink
directions: Pour ingredients in a large glass in this order; chocolate milk, Kahlua, schnapps.
Then hang the candy cane on the inside of the cup.
Drink slowly and enjoy your surroundings.

name: North Pole Drink
directions: Place all ingredients except whipped cream into a shaker cup filled with ice and shake very well.
Strain into a cocktail glass and top with whipped cream.
Enjoy a great drink.

name: Rich Eggnog
directions: Separate yolks and whites.
Beat yolks slowly while adding sugar; beat until the mixture is pale and golden.
Slowly add brandy and rum, beat in milk and half the cream.
Set aside until just before serving.
Whisk whites until stiff, fold into the eggnog mixture.
Whip remaining cream and icing sugar until thick.
Top each glass with whipped cream and a shake of nutmeg.

name: Easy Eggless Eggnog
directions: Mix together first three ingredients in a pitcher and chill covered for 30 minutes.
Sprinkle with nutmeg just before serving.

name: Eggless Eggnog
directions: In large bowl, mix pudding with 1 cup milk.
When pudding is thick, add remaining ingredients, mix very well.
Chill.
For Vegetarian use a Vegetarian Instant Vanilla Pudding Mix.

name: Special Chocolate Eggnog
directions: In large bowl, beat together yolks, sugar, cocoa and vanilla until thick and smooth.
Slowly stir in milk and rum, mix well.
Cover and refrigerate until just before serving, at least two hours, so mixture becomes very cold.
Beat whites with salt to soft peaks.
Fold whipped cream into chocolate mixture, gently fold in whites.
Serve immediately, garnished with grated chocolate.

name: Avocado Margaritas
directions: Puree the avocado with all the ingredients.
Serve in salt rimmed glasses To get the salt to stick to the glass dip the rim of the glass in lighten beaten egg white and then into coarse sea salt.

name: Spiced Tea Mix
directions: Combine the sugar, beverage crystals, lemonade mix, tea mix and cloves in a large bowl and mix well.
Store in airtight container.
To Serve: Place 2 heaping tablespoon of the mix in a cup or mug.Add 3/4 boiling water and stir until mixed.

name: Larry's Margaritas
directions: Combine all ingredients in large pitcher.
This is the best margarita recipe I have come across in my entire life!
It will make a margarita lover out of anyone.
The blue margarita salt is really for looks, but also cuts a bit of the sweet taste from the lime juice.

name: Chile Pepper Vodka
directions: Put the chiles in the bottle of vodka.
Let the vodka sit for a week.
At the end of the week, taste the vodka.
Is it hot enough: If hot enough, strain out the peppers and use the vodka.
If not hot enough, return to shelf.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Maria W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar

name: Top Shelf Margarita
directions: Fill mixing glass with ice.
Pour in all ingredients.
Shake well.
Pour into salt rimmed glass.
Add lime wedge or wheel.

name: Bloody Bull
directions: In a small bowl or pitcher, combine tomato juice, bouillon, vodka, Worcestershire sauce, hot sauce, Essence, celery salt, lime juice and lemon juice and stir to blend well.
Divide the mixture between two highball glasses containing ice, and garnish with black pepper and celery stick.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Maria W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar
Spicy Bloody Mary W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar

name: Chilly Irishman
directions: Combine ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Bloody Eight
directions: In pitcher, combine V8 juice, horseradish, worcestershire sauce, and hot pepper sauce.
Pour over ice.
If desired, garnish with celery stick.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Mary W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar
Spicy Bloody Maria W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar

name: 501 Blues
directions: In a large glass filled with ice, add Sprite, curacao, club soda and blueberry schnapps.
Stir and serve.

name: Black Forest Martini
directions: In a martini shaker, fill with about 1 cup of ice.
Add Creme de Cacao, vodka, and Chambord.
Shake well.
Pour into chilled martini glasses.

name: Pangalactic Gargle Blaster
directions: Mix and find a nice place to land.

name: Cool Blue Martini
directions: In a shaker filled with ice, add first four ingredients.
Shake well, then strain into 2 martini glasses.
Garnish with lemon twists.

name: Creamy Pumpkin Nog
directions: Put milk, yogurt, cream and eggs into a blender or mixer and blend/beat until frothy.
Stir in pumpkin, honey, sugar and mix thoroughly.
Blend in the spices.
Pour the eggnog into glasses and sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Tomato Juice Cocktail
directions: Put all ingredients except ice in blender container.
Process until all ingredients are liquefied.
Remove feeder cap and add ice cubes; process until ice is all melted.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Mary W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar
Spicy Bloody Maria W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar

name: Brandy Alexander Frappe
directions: Put all ingredients in blender.
Process until smooth.

name: Eggnog
directions: Put everything in a blender and whip.

name: Blue Lagoon
directions: Buy the Pepsi Blue at any Gas station.
Open the Parrot Bay.
Add THREE shots or more if you wish, of Parrot Bay.
Close the bottle up tight.
Give it a little shake, then pour over ice.
IT NEEDS TO BE REALLY COLD!
Bon appetit!

name: Blue Margarita
directions: Blend all ingredients together, pour over ice and garnish with lemon wedge.

name: The Fun Ship
directions: Blend all ingredients together, pour over ice and garnish with orange slice and cherry.

name: Tropical Peach Colada
directions: Blend all ingredients together until smooth.

name: Twilight Zone
directions: Blend all ingredients together until smooth, pour into glass and float the blue curacao over the top.

name: Lime Light
directions: Mix ingredients together with ice, strain into martini glass and garnish with lemon and lime twist.

name: Pink Diamond
directions: Mix ingredients together with ice, strain into glass and garnish with cherry.

name: Mexican Bloody Mary
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Add tomato juice, Tequila, L&P Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco and celery salt.
Stir.
Garnish with lime wedge and chilli pepper.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Mary W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar
Spicy Bloody Maria W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar

name: Ice Cap Cocktail
directions: Place ice in an 8-10 oz"on the rocks glass".
Add ginger ale, then the chocolate brandy followed by the creme de menthe.
Add the half and half or milk by slowly pouring over the back of a spoon.
Garnish with a mint sprig and sreve.

similar.name: Best Ever Long Island Iced Tea

name: Vegetable Juice Cocktail
directions: Puree all ingredients in a blender.
Cover and refrigerate for one hour, strain, mix in salt& pepper and serve.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Mary W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar

name: Spicy Friendship Tea Mix
directions: In a bowl, combine all ingredients.
Mix well.
To serve:Dissolve 4-1/2 tsp in 1 cup of boiling water.

name: Chocolate Eggnog (Non Alcoholic)
directions: Mix eggnog with chocolate syrup.
Chill.
Whip the cream with sugar and cocoa.
Fold into eggnog mixture.
Serve.

name: Chai Tea Gift Mix
directions: Mix all together and place in pretty airtight container and attach these instructions: For each serving, place 3 to 4 heaping teaspoons mix in a cup.
Fill with 8 ounces very hot water.
For creamier chai, use half milk and half water.

name: Cranberry Cooler Cocktail
directions: Mix rum and cranberry juice.
Pour into stem glasses.
Top with small scoop of sherbet.

name: Hot Toddy
directions: Place a silver spoon in a heavy Old Fashion glass or heat-proof mug to prevent cracking.
Add rum, sugar, cloves and lemon slice.
Fill with boiling water.
Stir and serve.
Note: Hot Buttered Toddy: Add 1 TBS of butter before pouring in boiling water.

name: Cosmopolitan
directions: Pour ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into a martini glass.

similar.name: Best Ever Long Island Iced Tea

name: Woo-Woo
directions: Add the first 3 ingredients into an ice-filled cocktail shaker.
Shake well; strain into an old-fashioned glass filled with ice.
Drop a lime wedge into the drink and serve.

name: Scorpion
directions: To a cocktail shaker filled with ice, add all the ingredients.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a highball glass filled with ice.
Squeeze one wedge of lime into the glass and drop the lime wedge into the glass.
Serve with a straw.

name: Comfortable Dawg
directions: Add the first 6 ingredients to an ice-filled cocktail shaker.
Shake vigorously.
Pour into an old-fashioned glass; add ice if you want or if there is room.
Garnish with a cherry and lime slice.

name: Scarlett O' Hara
directions: Mix together the first 3 ingredients.
Pour into ice-filled glasses.
Garnish with lime slices.

name: Gilligans Island
directions: pour ice into a glass, add ingredients, stir.

name: juicyfruit
directions: add ice to a tall glass, stir in ingredients.

name: Blue Lagoon
directions: Add the blue curacao and vodka to an ice-filled highball glass.
Fill remainder of glass with Seven-Up.
Garnish with maraschino cherry and lemon slice if desired.

name: Vanilla Almond Coffee
directions: In a large Ziplock bag, place coffee and add extracts.
Stir the coffee very well to blend in flavors.
Store flavored coffee in a plastic bag or an airtight container in the refrigerator.
I freeze my coffee to keep its freshness.
I take out how much I need and place it back into the freezer.
Brew coffee as usual.
You can use decaffeinated coffee as well as other flavored oils such as coconut, rum, hazelnut and chocolate.

name: Blue Lips
directions: Add ice to a cocktail shaker until it is three-quarters full.
Add all three drink ingredients; cover, and shake vigorously.
Strain into two chilled martini glassess or strain into two ice-filled small cocktail glasses.

name: Cosmopolitan
directions: Place vodka, Triple Sec and cranberry juice in martini shaker.
Shake well and pour into martini glass.
Garnish with twist of lemon.

similar.name: Best Ever Long Island Iced Tea

name: Eye of a Hurricane
directions: Add all the ingredients to a large pitcher; stir to mix.
Serve immediately in ice-filled glasses.

name: Blue Tarantula Margarita
directions: Pour the lime juice onto a saucer Pour salt onto another saucer.
Dip the rim of a glass into the lime juice and then into the salt.
Put desired amount of ice into the glass.
Pour the last 4 ingredients into the glass and stir well.
Enjoy!

name: Gaslight Martini
directions: Add all ingredients to a martini shaker full of ice; shake until ice cold, about 30 seconds.
Pour into a martini glass and garnish with orange peel and cherry.

name: Hail Caesar!!
directions: Place celery salt in a small bowl or saucer.
Wet the rim of a glass with a lemon slice& rub in the celery salt.
Mix lemon juice, Tabasco and  Worcestershire in the glass.
Season to taste with salt& pepper.
Add vodka, ice cubes and Clamato; stir well.
Serve with a stick of celery.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Maria W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar
Spicy Bloody Mary W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar

name: Windex Cocktail
directions: Mix both ingredients together and serve straight up in a shot glass.

name: Instant Chai Tea Mix
directions: In a large bowl, combine milk powder, non-dairy creamer, vanilla flavored creamer, sugar and instant tea. Stir in ginger, cinnamon, cloves and cardamom. In a blender or food processor, blend 1 cup at a time, until mixture is the consistency of fine powder.
To serve: Stir 2 heaping tablespoons Chai tea mixture into a mug of hot water.
Store dry mixture in an airtight container.

name: Quiet Spirit Tea Blend
directions: Combine all the ingredients and store in an airtight container away from heat, moisture and light.
Use 1 tsp of the mix per 6 oz. of boiling water, using a tea ball or teapot and strainer.  Let steep for 5--8 minutes.

similar.name: Best Ever Long Island Iced Tea

name: Barrier Reef
directions: Put all ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Shake thouroughly and pour into a long drink glass.
Garnish with your favourite garnish and serve immidiately!

name: Cedarwood
directions: Mix all together.
Serve over ice.

name: Eggnog
directions: Put your yolks in the bowl that you plan to serve the nog in, and mix in half of the sugar with a fork.
In a separate bowl, beat your egg whites with a whisk, until they're white and foamy.
Slowly beat the other half of the sugar into the egg whites (Be gentle here, you're not trying to make merangue!).
Pour the egg whites into the bowl with the yolks, and stir through with a fork.
Add the milk, rum, whiskey, and half of the cream, and mix well.
Beat the other half of the cream until it is thick, and carefully fold it into the nog.
Serve in short, wide glasses, garnished with a little grated nutmeg.

NOTE: If you plan to take this to a party, as I have done in the past, the best way to do it is to mix the egg mixture, and the alcoholic liquids, and place them in a one liter thermos flask, and put that, as well as a one liter carton of milk, and a 500Ml carton of cream (And a nutmeg grinder if you have one) into a large bowl, and just mix it all together when you get there. That saves you from having to worry about spilling it on your way to the party, and is convenient, as you don't have to worry about measuring liquids - You just pour it all in!

name: Choco Colada
directions: Mix in a shaker or blender.
Serve in a highball glass and sprinkle with chocolate shavings.

name: Black Knight
directions: Pour grenadine in bottom of glass.
Then layer Kaluha over the grenadine, then Bailey's Irish Cream, and then Sambuca.
Add a teaspoon of Advocat.
Put a stopper in the grenadine bottle and place finger on top to stop liquid from escaping.
Place bottle in bottom of glass and release.
SLAM!

name: Knock 'you' off Cask & Cream
directions: Mix all together by hand or in a blender and store in refridgerator. I prefer a very clean glass jar.
I would give this a week to 'cure.'.
This will keep for weeks and weeks.

name: Royal Duck Shot
directions: Put ingredients in a shaker.
Shake well to combine.
Pour and serve in a shot glass.

name: Avocado Daiquiri
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.

name: Big Apple Mojito
directions: Crush mint leaves and lime juice in a tall glass.
Cover with simple syrup and fill glass with ice.
Add rum and lemon lime soda (or club soda), stir well.
Add mint to garnish.

similar.name: Best Ever Long Island Iced Tea

name: Godiva Irish Cream
directions: Pour coffee, Godiva Liqueur and Irish cream liqueur into mug.
Stir.
Garnish with whipped cream.

name: Raw Eggnog
directions: In a glass or ceramic mug, blend the molasses, nutmeg and egg yolk with a fork.
Pour in a little milk and mix until blended.  Add remaining milk and stir.

name: Oma's Eggnog
directions: In a large jar or mixing bowl beat egg yolks and sugar until light in color.  The longer the better.
Slowly add the brandy.  Slowly is key, or it will curdle.
Split the vanilla bean and scrape it out as much as possible.  Add it at any point to the mixture.
Let mixture stand about an hour.   In that time it will settle.
Funnel into a pretty bottle (about 750 milliliter) put the whole vanilla bean in the bottle.
Refrigerate a couple of weeks.
Shake before serving.
Put it in a cognac glass.  Garnish with nutmeg.  I like it without but, some people will want it.
ENJOY!

name: Cinnamon Espresso
directions: Put about 6 or 7 Tablespoons of coffee beans in your coffee grinder.

Add a small piece of cinnamon stick to the beans. Try a very small piece the first time. The idea is to get the aroma of the cinnamon in the coffee but not taste it fully in the drink. If you are crazy about cinnamon, put in a bit more. Personally, I like to put in a very small sliver.
Grind the coffee beans and the cinnamon together.
Make espresso as usual using whatever machine you usually use.
Add sugar and/or milk if desired.

name: Hara-Kiri
directions: Shake everything in a shaker with a few ice cubes.
Strain in a shot glass.
Enjoy!

name: Stew Leonards' Sangria
directions: Combine juice, wine, sugar, brandy, Cointreau, orange and lemon. Chill.
Before serving, add ice and club soda. Serve in a festive pitcher.

name: Melon Ball
directions: Place 1 cup of ice in a cocktail shaker. Add melon liqueur, vodka and pineapple juice. Shake well until shaker is thoroughly frosted with condensation. Strain into a martini glass. Garnish with maraschino cherry and serve.

name: Green Tea Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into a cocktail shaker that has been filled with ice.
Shake vigorously.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a sliver of crystallized ginger.
Enjoy!.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Maria W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar

name: Vesper
directions: Combine Lillet Blanc, gin, vodka, bitters and quinine powder in a cocktail shaker full of ice. Shake well until very cold, and shaker is fully frosted with condensation. Strain into martini glass and garnish with twist of lemon peel.

name: Classic Margarita
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.  Add all ingredients and shake for 30 seconds. Set aside.
Place a lime round into the base of a salt-rimmed martini glass.
Shake the margarita 15 seconds more, then strain into glasses.
Serve immediately.
If ice is desired place a lime round into the base of a highball glass, fill halfway with ice and pour margarita over the top.
*SIMPLE SYRUP:  Easy to make.  Take one part sugar and one part water, bring it to a boil, stir to dissolve and cool.  Can be made as far in advance as you like, just store it in the fridge.

name: Kahlua Martini (Aka Black Russian)
directions: Place ingredients into a cocktail shaker.
Shake.
Pour.
Enjoy!

name: Best Ever Long Island Iced Tea
directions: Shake the vodka, gin, tequila, rum, creme de menthe, lemon juice and sugar syrup vigorously over ice cubes until well frosted.
Strain into a highball glass filled with cracked ice and fill with cola.
Dress with the lime or lemon slice.

name: Citrus Sangria
directions: Mix everything in a sangria glass with ice or in a pitcher or something else.
You can garnish with a slice of lemon or lime.  Or maybe add fresh fruits to it.
You may need to add sugar if it's not sweet enough for you.  Hope you enjoy and I wish you all a great summer :).

name: Patron Grapefruit
directions: Pour all ingredients in a glass over ice and give it a stir.  Garnish with grapefruit peel and lime wheel.

name: Patron Pineapple
directions: Fill glass with ice.
Pour in tequila and Citronge.
Top off glass with pineapple juice and give it a squeeze of lime.
Stir and serve with a lime wheel as garnish.

name: Spicy Bloody Mary W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar
directions: In a large pitcher combine V8 and vodka.
Add horseradish, lemon juice, vinegar, Worcestershire, celery salt, and pepper flakes, stir to blend.
Adjust seasoning and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Combine kosher salt and celery seed on a plate. Rub rims of glasses with a lemon wedge. then dip each rim into salt mixture.
Fill each glass with ice and top with V8 mixture.
Garnish each drink with giardenia.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Maria W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar

name: Spicy Bloody Maria W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar
directions: In a large pitcher combine V8 and vodka.
Add horseradish, lemon juice, vinegar, Worcestershire, celery salt, and pepper flakes, stir to blend.
Adjust seasoning and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Combine kosher salt and celery seed on a plate. Rub rims of glasses with a lemon wedge. then dip each rim into salt mixture.
Fill each glass with ice and top with V8 mixture.
Garnish each drink with giardenia.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Mary W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar

name: Skippy Juice
directions: Fill a highball glass (8-10 ounce glass) half way with ice cubes.
Pour rum in glass.
Pour ginger ale in glass.
Add lemon and stir.
Enjoy!

name: Daniel Burnam Cocktail
directions: Combine tequila, Cointreau, lime juice and watermelon puree in a glass. Muddle with a couple leaves of fresh cilantro then shake with ice.
Rim a glass with cilantro mixed with salt and pour in the cocktail. Garnish with a skewer of a lime slice and a watermelon ball.

name: Ginger Balls
directions: Combine liquids in a glass.
Garnish with cherries.

similar.name: Spicy Bloody Maria W/Red Pepper Flakes & Balsamic Vinegar
